summary: Markets await US CPI data as the pivotal trigger, with soft readings expected to boost rate-cut bets favoring crypto, precious metals, and EUR/USD, while hot CPI could strengthen USD and pressure risk assets. Geopolitical de-escalation in Hormuz supports consolidation in BTC and risk assets amid strong ETF inflows. Altcoin sentiment leans bullish on Ethereum and Solana flows, with XRP sensitive to regulatory news.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Multiple videos suggest bullish bias with mentions of squeezes, rallies, and higher targets ($85K), but with acknowledged traps and failed tests indicating volatility and risk
